questions.question: What is a line segment?
questions.answer: A line segment is a part of a line with two endpoints.

questions.question: What is a ray?
questions.answer: A ray is a part of a line with one endpoint extending infinitely in one direction.

questions.question: What is an angle?
questions.answer: An angle is formed when two rays meet at a common point called the vertex.

questions.question: What is an acute angle?
questions.answer: An acute angle is an angle whose measure is greater than 0° but less than 90°.

questions.question: What is a right angle?
questions.answer: A right angle is an angle measuring exactly 90°.

questions.question: What is an obtuse angle?
questions.answer: An obtuse angle is an angle greater than 90° but less than 180°.

questions.question: What is a straight angle?
questions.answer: A straight angle is an angle measuring 180°.

questions.question: What are complementary angles?
questions.answer: Complementary angles are two angles whose sum is 90°.

questions.question: What are supplementary angles?
questions.answer: Supplementary angles are two angles whose sum is 180°.

questions.question: What are adjacent angles?
questions.answer: Adjacent angles are two angles that share a common vertex and a common arm.

questions.question: What is a linear pair of angles?
questions.answer: A linear pair consists of two adjacent angles whose non-common arms form a straight line.

questions.question: What is the sum of angles in a linear pair?
questions.answer: The sum of angles in a linear pair is 180°.

questions.question: What are vertically opposite angles?
questions.answer: Vertically opposite angles are the angles opposite each other when two lines intersect.

questions.question: What is the relationship between vertically opposite angles?
questions.answer: Vertically opposite angles are equal.

questions.question: What are parallel lines?
questions.answer: Parallel lines are lines in the same plane that never intersect.

questions.question: What is the distance between two parallel lines?
questions.answer: The distance between two parallel lines is constant.

questions.question: What is a transversal?
questions.answer: A transversal is a line that intersects two or more lines at different points.

questions.question: What are corresponding angles?
questions.answer: Corresponding angles are angles in matching positions when a transversal cuts two lines.

questions.question: What are alternate interior angles?
questions.answer: Alternate interior angles are angles on opposite sides of a transversal inside two lines.

questions.question: What is the sum of angles around a point?
questions.answer: The sum of angles around a point is 360°.

questions.question: What happens if corresponding angles are equal?
questions.answer: The two lines cut by the transversal are parallel.

questions.question: What happens if alternate interior angles are equal?
questions.answer: The lines are parallel.

questions.question: What type of angle is 120°?
questions.answer: 120° is an obtuse angle.

questions.question: What type of angle is 45°?
questions.answer: 45° is an acute angle.

questions.question: State the theorem about lines parallel to the same line.
questions.answer: Lines parallel to the same line are parallel to each other.
